metadata.description: Add your own items from non-OGL sourcebooks here

data.name: Healing Belt
data.description: 3 charges per day. Spend 1 charge to heal 2d8 hp, 2 charges for 3d8, 3 charges for 4d8. Source: Magic Item Compendium p101

data.name: Everlasting Rations
data.description: Provides enough food for one Medium creature for one day. Rations magically replenish every 24 hours. Source: Complete Adventurer
